description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow to manually build a binary on Linux x86-64. Trigger on push to the qt6 branch and allow manual dispatch. Use an ubuntu-20.04 job that checks out the code, sets up Python 3.13 with pip caching, upgrades pip, installs Qt 6.7.3, installs Python dependencies including PyQt6, builds extensions with setup.py, and builds with pyinstaller. Upload the resulting dist directory as an artifact named my-artifact.
